sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this shmup title

special_mechanics.name: 8-Directional Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player character moves in 8 directions via D-Pad; not limited to 4-way cardinal movement

special_mechanics.name: Craft-Specific Flight Speeds
special_mechanics.description: Four different organic ships (Biowarriors) available; each has different flight speeds and weapon loadouts

special_mechanics.name: Power Star Blocking Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Player must position Power Star in path of incoming projectiles to block/reflect them

special_mechanics.name: Fast Scrolling
special_mechanics.description: Scrolling and enemy movement documented as extremely fast in comparison to other games of its time

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative data only. Bio-Hazard Battle is a horizontal scrolling shmup with no documented jump physics or gravity mechanics (not a platformer). Movement is 8-directional flight-based rather than walking/running. No sub-pixel precision documentation exists. Primary gameplay mechanics involve shoot-dodge-block with varying craft speeds.
